title: FLOSS Weekly 489: Pillar
summary:
The Pillar Project is a non-profit foundation in Switzerland, and it promises to empower individuals through decentralized technology and help them take ownership of their personal data. David Siegel is a serial entrepreneur, web pioneer, prolific author, and founder and CEO of the Pillar Project, building an open-source "smart wallet" in London. David led the Pillar team to a successful ICO in 2017, raising over $20 million and making the Pillar token sale one of the most successful grassroots fundings in history.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
